title: Sound Categories
description: Allows mods to add more sound categories that are adjustable in the Minecraft sound settings.
body:
Originally created by the great Stashymane, which has sadly been discontinued.

Fabric library that allows mods to add more sound categories, and modifies the Minecraft sound settings menu to fit as many categories as required.
This is a library for developers and should never have to be installed by the end-user.

[If you're a mod developer, check the GitHub repository for more information.](https://github.com/extrasounds/sound-categories)
